text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
144 
ICL_AMT 
LABEL: 
Part D Plan Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of Part D ICL applied by the Part D plan. If no ICL is applied this field 
is blank. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
The Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit is also referred to as the coverage
